name: Microtek International, Inc.
summary: Microtek International, Inc. produces and sells digital imaging solutions for business, medical, NDT, bio and science, and digital archiving applications in Taiwan and internationally. It offers entry-level and hi-speed flat, ADF, professional photo film, object, large-scale image and document, NDT, gel, and medical film scanners, as well as flatbed scanners, including scanners for books and bound materials. The company also provides X-Ray workstations and digitizers, dental workstations and digitizers, image management software, film digitizing systems, and digital cloud systems. In addition, it offers ScanWizrad Graph, a software for capturing images of large-scale; MiBio, a software for analyzing images designed for the bio-tech analysis and research; and ScanPotter, a document imaging software for Mac OS. Microtek International, Inc. was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.
